across.clue: To start behaving like an adult and become more sensible as you get older.
To offend is to make someone angry or upset.
A recipe is a set of instructions for cooking a certain type of food.
A concerto is music played with an orchestra but features a solo instrument.
a belief that things such as magic or luck have the power to affect your life.
Broccoli is a green vegetable with a thick stem and a bunch of dark green tops.
Lead to a response | Cause/produce/provoke/trigger a ___ (to)
When someone is active, they move a lot or have a lot of things to do.

down.clue: To appoint someone to a job means to give the job to them.
A fellow is someone who shares a job or quality with someone else.
Epilepsy is a medical condition that affects the brain and can make someone become unconscious or unable to control their movement for a short time.
To deceive is to make someone believe something that is not true.
Consequent means happening because of a different situation.
If something is homogeneous, it is made up of things which are all the same.
to take legal action to end your marriage
A parliament is the group of people who make laws in some countries.
Intestines are tubes through which food passes after it leaves the stomach.
If something is physical, it is related to your body and not your mind.
To proceed is to go somewhere or to continue doing something.
Midnight is twelve o’clock at night.
